patch.value: Vision: pm is a universal, agent-optimized, git-native project management CLI that ships PM primitives via an SDK so any project can fully customize and optimize it. Guiding principle: project management = context management. This milestone groups the post-v0.1 capability epics and their open backlog (surfaced by the 2026-05-31 ecosystem audit pm-w7f2). PRD post-v0.1 roadmap items (advanced search tuning, adapter optimization, sandbox API surface) live here as concrete, dedup-checked work.
Forward-looking roadmap milestone anchoring the open, living backlog for pm-cli beyond v0.1. Complements (does not duplicate) the closed PRD delivery milestones.
Deliver a universal, fully-customizable PM tool whose baseline primitives (via the pm SDK) adapt to any project
A discoverable forward backlog turns the tracker from a completed-work log into a living context map for humans and agents
Tracker had 902 items but zero open/forward work; pm context returned empty. This milestone seeds the forward layer.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: 2026-06-07 ecosystem audit (plan pm-8u2a): rebuilt the empty forward backlog — 71 new OPEN items across all 9 capability epics + 2 new ADRs (pm-7sq6 coverage governance, pm-cc04 agent self-repair). Delivered by 5 specialized audit sub-agents (disjoint epic scopes). pm context now returns actionable leaf work again.

patch.value: Living backlog reflects the entire ecosystem; every capability epic has defined acceptance and active children; periodic audits keep zero orphan open items and zero untracked work streams.

author: maintainer-agent

patch.value:
## Vision
pm is a universal, agent-optimized, git-native project management CLI that ships PM primitives via an SDK so any project can fully customize and optimize it. Guiding principle: **project management = context management** — an agent must be able to rebuild full working context from the pm CLI alone.

This milestone groups the post-v0.1 capability epics and their open backlog (surfaced by the 2026-05-31 ecosystem audit pm-w7f2; last reconciled by audit #4 pm-osea on 2026-07-04). PRD post-v0.1 roadmap items (advanced search tuning, adapter optimization, sandbox API surface) live under the relevant capability epic as concrete, dedup-checked work.

## Living capability epics (index)
Each is a permanently-open living backlog; new work in that area lands there. Scope In/Out boundaries are stated in each epic charter so no two overlap.

- pm-mpbb — CLI command surface & agent ergonomics
- pm-o2kc — Storage, history & data durability
- pm-ydp6 — Search & semantic retrieval
- pm-ugqx — Extension & package platform maturity (incl. SDK, plugins)
- pm-33cw — Governance, validation & data quality
- pm-dj98 — Concurrency & multi-agent safety
- pm-5oj5 — Observability, telemetry & health
- pm-8jdc — Schema, config & universal customization (incl. profiles)
- pm-5k4v — MCP server & contract platform
- pm-92if — CodeFactor / source-code quality (A→A+)
- pm-u9d0 — Docs, onboarding, release & CI
- pm-m2u1 — Architecture Decision Records (living decision log)

## Convention
Capability epics stay OPEN even with zero open children (living backlogs). Audits are CREATE-ONLY on closed items (changelog buckets by updated_at). Every pm validate/health warning maps to exactly one open remediation item.

message: Audit #4: enumerate the 12 living capability epics as a roadmap index; add pm-33cw governance epic

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Audit evidence 2026-07-04 continuation: inspected all statuses with pm list --status all, pm stats, pm aggregate, pm validate --check-resolution --check-history-drift, pm health --check-only --summary, pm next, active duplicate-title scan, active parent-link scan, and live gh issue/pr list. Live totals: 1506 pm items, 1514 history streams, 24446 history entries. Status distribution: 37 open, 13 in_progress, 1444 closed, 12 canceled, 0 blocked. Type distribution: 1 Milestone, 81 Epics, 286 Features, 286 Issues, 524 Tasks, 224 Chores, 17 Plans, 50 Decisions, 36 Stories, 1 Reminder. Active structure: 50 active items, zero active non-epic orphans, zero duplicate-looking active titles, pm next ready=36 blocked=0. GitHub cross-check: one open issue GH-427, already tracked by in_progress pm-lt6n; zero open PRs. Existing broad audit lineages pm-y904 and pm-osea are closed with evidence and remain canonical, so no duplicate audit item was created. Residual governance: validate reports validate_resolution_missing_fields:268 on closed historical items, already represented by open pm-e9zh; active metadata filter only flags claimed epic pm-4ak1 for missing estimate/reviewer/sprint/release metadata, noted there without taking over the claim.

patch.value:
## Vision
pm is a universal, agent-optimized, git-native project management CLI that ships PM primitives via an SDK so any project can fully customize and optimize it. Guiding principle: **project management = context management** — an agent must be able to rebuild full working context from the pm CLI alone.

This milestone groups the post-v0.1 capability epics and their open backlog (surfaced by the 2026-05-31 ecosystem audit pm-w7f2; last reconciled by audit #4 pm-osea on 2026-07-04). PRD post-v0.1 roadmap items (advanced search tuning, adapter optimization, sandbox API surface) live under the relevant capability epic as concrete, dedup-checked work.

## Living capability epics (index)
Each is a permanently-open living backlog; new work in that area lands there. Scope In/Out boundaries are stated in each epic charter so no two overlap.

- pm-mpbb — CLI command surface & agent ergonomics
- pm-o2kc — Storage, history & data durability
- pm-ydp6 — Search & semantic retrieval
- pm-ugqx — Extension & package platform maturity (incl. SDK, plugins)
- pm-33cw — Governance, validation & data quality
- pm-dj98 — Concurrency & multi-agent safety
- pm-5oj5 — Observability, telemetry & health
- pm-8jdc — Schema, config & universal customization (incl. profiles)
- pm-5k4v — MCP server & contract platform
- pm-92if — CodeFactor / source-code quality (A→A+)
- pm-u9d0 — Docs, onboarding, release & CI
- pm-m2u1 — Architecture Decision Records (living decision log)

## Convention
Capability epics stay OPEN even with zero open children (living backlogs). Audits are CREATE-ONLY on closed items (changelog buckets by updated_at). Every pm validate/health warning maps to exactly one open remediation item.

## Update 2026-07-05 — strategic initiatives
Two cross-cutting initiative epics created (parented under their capability epics, indexed here for discoverability):
- **pm-n7rr** (under pm-mpbb) — CLI surface simplification: noun-verb grammar, ~15 top-level nouns, zero feature loss, alias-preserving deprecation. ADR pm-pbyu.
- **pm-usfg** (under pm-ugqx) — SDK-first architecture: the pm SDK becomes the single public API delivering all universal PM primitives; CLI/MCP are presentation layers. ADR pm-muhw.
These deliver this milestone's stated objective directly: a universal, fully-customizable PM tool whose baseline primitives ship via the pm SDK.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Ecosystem audit #7 (2026-07-06, maintainer-agent). Verified live: npm 2026.7.6 published (auto-release healthy, logged on pm-7zs0); ADR pm-muhw accepted; first SDK execution primitive shipped (pm-xzhz, PR #456). Coverage gap closed: all 20 open GitHub issues lacking tracker items are now tracked — 18 new dedup-checked items (16 dogfood findings under pm-mpbb/pm-8jdc/pm-5k4v/pm-ydp6/pm-5oj5, contracts-summary pm-vxxm under pm-n7rr) + triage chore pm-7cx8 for stale reports GH-436/GH-440 (features verified already shipped). GH-427 remains tracked by in-progress pm-lt6n. pm-n7rr grammar mapping now covers all 64 live top-level spellings (aggregate/test-all homes recorded on ADR pm-pbyu + pm-6apl). Validate warnings unchanged and all map to open items: resolution/close_reason -> pm-e9zh, GH-209 dupe -> pm-pivf, linked-files -> pm-j8z6. Zero orphans among active items; agent-story layer intact (14).

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Audit #8 (2026-07-06, maintainer-agent): full verification pass over all 1558 items, no gaps found, zero new items needed (dedupe-checked). Verified live: (1) GitHub coverage 1:1 — all 21 open GH issues map to exactly one open pm item (GH-436/440 shipped-stale, covered by triage chore pm-7cx8); no GH issue newer than GH-458. (2) Shipped work closed — pm-xzhz (PR#456), pm-8778 (PR#431), pm-q1ke (PR#434), pm-2muu/pm-8t5x (PR#430) all closed with resolution/expected/actual. PRs #447/#451 (auto-release ratchet fix + blocker-retry) are release-train maintenance logged on living reminder pm-7zs0 per its charter. (3) Structure — zero orphan open items; 14 agent stories (one per capability epic + pm-1kxs/pm-w89s for the initiative epics); this milestone index current; initiative epics pm-n7rr (14 children) and pm-usfg (14 children, 3 closed) fully cover the 64-command grammar and SDK promotion families. (4) Governance — every pm validate warning maps to exactly one open item; files 146 missing +131 orphaned -> pm-j8z6; duplicate issue-code GH-209 -> pm-pivf; close_reason 18 + resolution fields 269 -> pm-e9zh. (5) In-progress items all legitimately claimed (pm-4ak1 docstrings epic by maintainer-agent; pm-lt6n, pm-92if by claude-code-agent). New audit-#7 items spot-checked: parent/AC/estimate/risk/confidence complete.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Ecosystem audit #9 (2026-07-06, session): full gates green on main+working tree (build, 5436 tests, eslint 0 warn, jscpd 0 clones, static-quality, contracts, secrets, changelog drift, docs links). Sandbox verification: packed tarball via npx OK (11 packages); external npm ecosystem smoke OK (pm-github/pm-changelog/pm-jira/pm-beads/@unbrained/pm-web/pm-graph/pm-csv/pm-ts-starter, 0 failed); CJS-host install+init+create+list OK; SDK 328 ESM exports + 43 testing exports importable, CJS require interops; scaffold->install->run extension end-to-end OK; never-block recovery verified (pm doctor suggests extension/package doctor). New items: pm-og1v (P1 lancedb cwd-relative path bug, FIXED in tree + 4 regression tests), pm-2czc (P1 dependabot unblock: @types/node 26 Stats type fix + cooldown + codeql group, FIXED in tree), pm-tgq6 (P3 Windows lock-test flake, GH-427 closed as stale/tracked), pm-p5u6 (P2 temp-footprint pruning after /tmp quota exhaustion broke local tooling mid-audit). GH hygiene: retitled #452/#453/#454 dogfood issues to real summaries with pm ids; confirmed every open GH issue maps to a pm item. Startup perf: pm --version 157ms, list 718ms, get 580ms @1558 items (extension latency tracked by pm-4oww). Nightly 2026-07-06 green on all platforms.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Ecosystem audit #10 (2026-07-06, full all-status manual review, 1563 items): ONE structural gap found and filed — pm-9x6e (capstone: zero the 91-entry SDK import-boundary baseline, flip MCP layer to SDK, harden ratchet to hard-deny; deps on all 8 pm-usfg promotion items). Organization fixes: parented the last 2 orphans pm-p5u6 + pm-tgq6 under pm-u9d0. Verified live: all 20 open GH issues map 1:1 to pm items (GH-455 fix shipped as pm-aems — triage closure folded into pm-7cx8); all 5 validate warning classes map to open items (pm-j8z6 146+129 file links, pm-e9zh 269 resolution + 18 close-reason incl. new pm-muhw entry, pm-pivf dup issue-code); pm-rjqr correctly stays in_progress (PR #466 shipped SDK read primitives, CLI-handler flip is the remaining AC); docstring epic pm-4ak1 lanes active; auto-release healthy (2026.7.4/5/6 all on npm). Simplification epic pm-n7rr: all 64 command spellings have exactly one grammar home (ADR pm-pbyu addendum), dependency graph fully wired (clusters -> pm-0z7n shim -> ADR), zero new clusters needed. SDK-first epic pm-usfg: all 8 domain promotions + exemplar + docs + boundary gate present; pm-9x6e was the only missing terminal piece. Active-item metadata 100% (body/AC/risk/confidence/priority/estimate).

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Ecosystem audit #11 (2026-07-06, post-PR#466): ZERO backlog gaps; one live CLI bug found while recording this note (filed, see below). Verified: (1) all 20 open GH issues map to pm items or triage chore pm-7cx8 (GH-455 fix shipped via pm-aems, GH closure queued there); (2) PR#466 merged 12:47Z — pm-6e1d closed, pm-rjqr intentionally in_progress (CLI query-handler flip shared with capstone pm-9x6e); (3) all 12 in_progress items claimed and recently updated (docstring epic pm-4ak1 lanes, pm-lt6n, pm-92if); (4) zero draft/blocked items; (5) every active item parented — milestone-rooted tree intact; (6) all 5 validate warning classes map to open items (files→pm-j8z6, dup issue-code→pm-pivf, close_reason+resolution→pm-e9zh); (7) npm 2026.7.6 published 07:10Z — auto-release healthy (pm-7zs0 satisfied for today); (8) initiative epics pm-n7rr + pm-usfg trees complete, no new promotion/consolidation gaps since audit #10. Live bug found: `pm notes <id> --add --stdin` silently stored the literal text "--stdin" as a note (flag-like token swallowed as value; notes also lack comments' --stdin/--edit/--delete parity, so the bad note needed a manual state revert + history re-anchor check). Filed as a new Issue under pm-mpbb this session.

author: maintainer-agent

patch.value:
## Vision
pm is a universal, agent-optimized, git-native project management CLI that ships PM primitives via an SDK so any project can fully customize and optimize it. Guiding principle: **project management = context management** — an agent must be able to rebuild full working context from the pm CLI alone.

This milestone groups the post-v0.1 capability epics and their open backlog (surfaced by the 2026-05-31 ecosystem audit pm-w7f2; last reconciled by audit #4 pm-osea on 2026-07-04). PRD post-v0.1 roadmap items (advanced search tuning, adapter optimization, sandbox API surface) live under the relevant capability epic as concrete, dedup-checked work.

## Living capability epics (index)
Each is a permanently-open living backlog; new work in that area lands there. Scope In/Out boundaries are stated in each epic charter so no two overlap.

- pm-mpbb — CLI command surface & agent ergonomics
- pm-o2kc — Storage, history & data durability
- pm-ydp6 — Search & semantic retrieval
- pm-ugqx — Extension & package platform maturity (incl. SDK, plugins)
- pm-33cw — Governance, validation & data quality
- pm-dj98 — Concurrency & multi-agent safety
- pm-5oj5 — Observability, telemetry & health
- pm-8jdc — Schema, config & universal customization (incl. profiles)
- pm-5k4v — MCP server & contract platform
- pm-92if — CodeFactor / source-code quality (A→A+)
- pm-u9d0 — Docs, onboarding, release & CI
- pm-m2u1 — Architecture Decision Records (living decision log)

## Convention
Capability epics stay OPEN even with zero open children (living backlogs). Audits are CREATE-ONLY on closed items (changelog buckets by updated_at). Every pm validate/health warning maps to exactly one open remediation item.

## Update 2026-07-05 — strategic initiatives
Two cross-cutting initiative epics created (parented under their capability epics, indexed here for discoverability):
- **pm-n7rr** (under pm-mpbb) — CLI surface simplification: noun-verb grammar, ~15 top-level nouns, zero feature loss, alias-preserving deprecation. ADR pm-pbyu.
- **pm-usfg** (under pm-ugqx) — SDK-first architecture: the pm SDK becomes the single public API delivering all universal PM primitives; CLI/MCP are presentation layers. ADR pm-muhw.
These deliver this milestone's stated objective directly: a universal, fully-customizable PM tool whose baseline primitives ship via the pm SDK.

## Update 2026-07-06 (audit #13) — index completion + long-term horizons
Capability-epic index addition (created by audit #12, indexed here now):
- pm-qwoy — Security & code scanning (scanner-import batches + per-finding issues)

Third strategic initiative:
- **pm-9rxu** (under pm-o2kc) — Scale-out: sub-second, bounded-token context at 100k-1M items with thousands of concurrent agents. ADR pm-bl8x. Children: pm-mi2x benchmark harness (do first), pm-801d persistent read index, pm-dfg0 cursor pagination, pm-0qg5 directory fan-out, pm-lvyd claim throughput, pm-o79o history/git growth policy, pm-g2zz agent story.

Composability contract set (under pm-mpbb, delivers the stated grep/jq/xargs product principle): pm-m9xv story, pm-646c NDJSON output mode, pm-psy1 scripting contract.

Horizon ordering of the initiatives (long-term plan):
1. Near: pm-n7rr CLI simplification + pm-usfg SDK-first (mutually reinforcing; ADRs pm-pbyu/pm-muhw first, then pm-a22j/pm-lodl baselines).
2. Mid: composability contract set + pm-qwoy zero-open-findings + governance/docs debt burn-down.
3. Long: pm-9rxu scale-out (ADR pm-bl8x may be accepted earlier; implementation follows the SDK-first primitive layer so index/pagination land in the SDK, not as CLI forks).

message: audit #13: index pm-qwoy + third initiative + horizon layout

## Update 2026-07-06 (audit #13) — index completion + long-term horizons

Composability contract set (under pm-mpbb, delivers the stated grep/jq/xargs product principle): pm-m9xv story, pm-646c NDJSON output mode, pm-psy1 scripting contract.

Horizon ordering of the initiatives (long-term plan):

3. Long: pm-9rxu scale-out (ADR pm-bl8x may be accepted earlier; implementation follows the SDK-first primitive layer so index/pagination land in the SDK, not as CLI forks).

## Update 2026-07-06 (audit #15) — horizon 4 + coverage completions

Backlog coverage completions (audit #15):
- pm-xkgq (under pm-n7rr) — fold aggregate into the query nouns (last uncovered query-family command).
- pm-npr3 (under pm-n7rr) — map init/config/schema/profile in the grammar table (last uncovered command family).
- pm-x6jf (under pm-usfg) — promote package/extension lifecycle primitives (last uncovered SDK domain).
- pm-rml5 (under pm-ugqx) — pm-github importer/exporter package: automates the per-audit GH-issue mirroring loop.

Horizon 4 (post scale-out):
- pm-agou (under pm-m2u1) — ADR: v1.0 GA stability contract (grammar freeze, SDK semver, format_version policy, scale targets). Draft after pm-pbyu and pm-bl8x are accepted.
- pm-is1a (under pm-o2kc) — multi-workspace federation exploration story (cross-workspace context/deps/aggregation); spike + ADR only, parked at P4 until single-workspace primitives land.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Audit evidence 2026-07-06/07 codex-agent all-status ecosystem pass: bootstrapped current checkout (npm install -g ., pm 2026.7.6, node v26.4.0, pnpm 11.10.0, pnpm build green). Live tracker after organization: 1652 items, 1660 history streams, 25330 history entries; status distribution 174 open, 0 in_progress, 0 blocked, 1466 closed, 12 canceled. Ran pm context/list-open/list-in-progress/list --status all/stats/aggregate/validate/health/next/contracts, plus GH issue coverage loop. Structural checks: zero active duplicate titles, zero open unparented items, zero open AC/estimate gaps by pm list filters, zero custom open description/risk/confidence gaps after backfilling 11 descriptions. validate lifecycle/stale blockers/cycles ok; health summary ok with 0 warnings; validate resolution warning remains known historical terminal metadata debt (269 rows) mapped to pm-e9zh. GitHub coverage: all 26 open GitHub issues GH-435..474 map to pm items; GH-455 is already fixed under pm-aems with open triage pm-hq0r for GitHub closure. New non-duplicate item filed: pm-kexu for update-many --dry-run filter-only preview support. No new broad audit umbrella was created; canonical roadmap remains this milestone with pm-n7rr, pm-usfg, pm-9rxu, pm-8ngt/pm-xtrd, and composability items pm-m9xv/pm-646c/pm-psy1.

author: codex-agent
message: All-status ecosystem audit recorded and tracker organization pass complete

patch.value:
## Vision
pm is a universal, agent-optimized, git-native project management CLI that ships PM primitives via an SDK so any project can fully customize and optimize it. Guiding principle: **project management = context management** — an agent must be able to rebuild full working context from the pm CLI alone.

This milestone groups the post-v0.1 capability epics and their open backlog (surfaced by the 2026-05-31 ecosystem audit pm-w7f2; last reconciled by audit #4 pm-osea on 2026-07-04). PRD post-v0.1 roadmap items (advanced search tuning, adapter optimization, sandbox API surface) live under the relevant capability epic as concrete, dedup-checked work.

## Living capability epics (index)
Each is a permanently-open living backlog; new work in that area lands there. Scope In/Out boundaries are stated in each epic charter so no two overlap.

- pm-mpbb — CLI command surface & agent ergonomics
- pm-o2kc — Storage, history & data durability
- pm-ydp6 — Search & semantic retrieval
- pm-ugqx — Extension & package platform maturity (incl. SDK, plugins)
- pm-33cw — Governance, validation & data quality
- pm-dj98 — Concurrency & multi-agent safety
- pm-5oj5 — Observability, telemetry & health
- pm-8jdc — Schema, config & universal customization (incl. profiles)
- pm-5k4v — MCP server & contract platform
- pm-92if — CodeFactor / source-code quality (A→A+)
- pm-u9d0 — Docs, onboarding, release & CI
- pm-m2u1 — Architecture Decision Records (living decision log)

## Convention
Capability epics stay OPEN even with zero open children (living backlogs). Audits are CREATE-ONLY on closed items (changelog buckets by updated_at). Every pm validate/health warning maps to exactly one open remediation item.

## Update 2026-07-05 — strategic initiatives
Two cross-cutting initiative epics created (parented under their capability epics, indexed here for discoverability):
- **pm-n7rr** (under pm-mpbb) — CLI surface simplification: noun-verb grammar, ~15 top-level nouns, zero feature loss, alias-preserving deprecation. ADR pm-pbyu.
- **pm-usfg** (under pm-ugqx) — SDK-first architecture: the pm SDK becomes the single public API delivering all universal PM primitives; CLI/MCP are presentation layers. ADR pm-muhw.
These deliver this milestone's stated objective directly: a universal, fully-customizable PM tool whose baseline primitives ship via the pm SDK.

## Update 2026-07-06 (audit #13) — index completion + long-term horizons
Capability-epic index addition (created by audit #12, indexed here now):
- pm-qwoy — Security & code scanning (scanner-import batches + per-finding issues)

Third strategic initiative:
- **pm-9rxu** (under pm-o2kc) — Scale-out: sub-second, bounded-token context at 100k-1M items with thousands of concurrent agents. ADR pm-bl8x. Children: pm-mi2x benchmark harness (do first), pm-801d persistent read index, pm-dfg0 cursor pagination, pm-0qg5 directory fan-out, pm-lvyd claim throughput, pm-o79o history/git growth policy, pm-g2zz agent story.

Composability contract set (under pm-mpbb, delivers the stated grep/jq/xargs product principle): pm-m9xv story, pm-646c NDJSON output mode, pm-psy1 scripting contract.

Horizon ordering of the initiatives (long-term plan):
1. Near: pm-n7rr CLI simplification + pm-usfg SDK-first (mutually reinforcing; ADRs pm-pbyu/pm-muhw first, then pm-a22j/pm-lodl baselines).
2. Mid: composability contract set + pm-qwoy zero-open-findings + governance/docs debt burn-down.
3. Long: pm-9rxu scale-out (ADR pm-bl8x may be accepted earlier; implementation follows the SDK-first primitive layer so index/pagination land in the SDK, not as CLI forks).

## Update 2026-07-06 (audit #15) — horizon 4 + coverage completions

Backlog coverage completions (audit #15):
- pm-xkgq (under pm-n7rr) — fold aggregate into the query nouns (last uncovered query-family command).
- pm-npr3 (under pm-n7rr) — map init/config/schema/profile in the grammar table (last uncovered command family).
- pm-x6jf (under pm-usfg) — promote package/extension lifecycle primitives (last uncovered SDK domain).
- pm-rml5 (under pm-ugqx) — EXTEND the existing pm-github package (import provenance adoption, evidence-comment sync, metadata seeding): automates the per-audit GH-issue mirroring loop.

Horizon 4 (post scale-out):
- pm-agou (under pm-m2u1) — ADR: v1.0 GA stability contract (grammar freeze, SDK semver, format_version policy, scale targets). Draft after pm-pbyu and pm-bl8x are accepted.
- pm-is1a (under pm-o2kc) — multi-workspace federation exploration story (cross-workspace context/deps/aggregation); spike + ADR only, parked at P4 until single-workspace primitives land.

## Update 2026-07-07 (audit #16) — long-horizon gap items

Full all-status review (session pm-su60): GH-issue coverage 26/26, all validate warnings mapped (pm-e9zh, pm-pivf), pm-n7rr grammar partition and pm-usfg promotion partition re-verified complete. Four dedupe-checked long-horizon gaps filed:

- pm-g5sx (under pm-o2kc) — tracker merge semantics: what "mergeable" (ADR pm-i7i4/pm-bl8x constraint) means per artifact class + post-merge reconciliation; prerequisite for pm-is1a federation. Horizon: long.
- pm-e200 (under pm-dj98) — mutation event stream primitive (pm events NDJSON + SDK subscription, cursor-resumable, no daemon); deps pm-646c/pm-801d; pm-slack package is the first consumer. Horizon: mid-long.
- pm-xc68 (under pm-33cw) — principal-based item-level policy exploration story (spike + ADR only, P4, dep pm-agou); layered-enforcement stance, feeds the pm-8ngt companies-on-pm-SDK vision. Horizon: 4+.
- pm-pee5 (under pm-ugqx) — EXTEND pm-brief with flow metrics (cycle/lead time, throughput, aging WIP) from history streams, on SDK read primitives. Horizon: mid.

## Vision
pm is a universal, agent-optimized, git-native project management CLI that ships PM primitives via an SDK so any project can fully customize and optimize it. Guiding principle: **project management = context management** — an agent must be able to rebuild full working context from the pm CLI alone.

- pm-5k4v — MCP server & contract platform
- pm-92if — CodeFactor / source-code quality (A→A+)
- pm-u9d0 — Docs, onboarding, release & CI
- pm-m2u1 — Architecture Decision Records (living decision log)

## Convention

- **pm-usfg** (under pm-ugqx) — SDK-first architecture: the pm SDK becomes the single public API delivering all universal PM primitives; CLI/MCP are presentation layers. ADR pm-muhw.
These deliver this milestone's stated objective directly: a universal, fully-customizable PM tool whose baseline primitives ship via the pm SDK.

Third strategic initiative:
- **pm-9rxu** (under pm-o2kc) — Scale-out: sub-second, bounded-token context at 100k-1M items with thousands of concurrent agents. ADR pm-bl8x. ## Update 2026-07-06 (audit #15) — horizon 4 + coverage completions

Backlog coverage completions (audit #15):
- pm-xkgq (under pm-n7rr) — fold aggregate into the query nouns (last uncovered query-family command).
- pm-npr3 (under pm-n7rr) — map init/config/schema/profile in the grammar table (last uncovered command family).
- pm-x6jf (under pm-usfg) — promote package/extension lifecycle primitives (last uncovered SDK domain).
- pm-rml5 (under pm-ugqx) — EXTEND the existing pm-github package (import provenance adoption, evidence-comment sync, metadata seeding): automates the per-audit GH-issue mirroring loop.

Horizon 4 (post scale-out):
- pm-agou (under pm-m2u1) — ADR: v1.0 GA stability contract (grammar freeze, SDK semver, format_version policy, scale targets). Draft after pm-pbyu and pm-bl8x are accepted.

## Update 2026-07-07 (audit #16) — long-horizon gap items

Full all-status review (session pm-su60): GH-issue coverage 26/26, all validate warnings mapped (pm-e9zh, pm-pivf), pm-n7rr grammar partition and pm-usfg promotion partition re-verified complete. Four dedupe-checked long-horizon gaps filed:

- pm-g5sx (under pm-o2kc) — tracker merge semantics: what "mergeable" (ADR pm-i7i4/pm-bl8x constraint) means per artifact class + post-merge reconciliation; prerequisite for pm-is1a federation. Horizon: long.
- pm-e200 (under pm-dj98) — mutation event stream primitive (pm events NDJSON + SDK subscription, cursor-resumable, no daemon); deps pm-646c/pm-801d; pm-slack package is the first consumer. Horizon: mid-long.

## Update 2026-07-07 — all-status backlog review + long-horizon planning pass
Full review across all 1657 items (open/closed/canceled) and the live command surface. Verified: GH-issue coverage 26/26; every pm validate warning maps to an open item (pm-e9zh close-reason evidence, pm-pivf GH-209 duplicate code); pm-n7rr grammar partition re-verified against the live 65-command surface (note on pm-n7rr); pm-usfg promotion partition unchanged and complete. Shipped-and-closed confirmation: restore-to-any-version (pm-9lc), history file recovery (pm-g6qd), per-stream hash-chain --verify, workspace-wide drift scan.

Three dedupe-checked gaps filed:
- **pm-klo8** (under pm-o2kc) — workspace-scoped audit history stream: schema/config/profile/init mutations currently leave NO append-only record (schema.ts/config.ts have zero history integration); closes the last hole in the every-mutation-leaves-immutable-proof invariant. Horizon: mid.
- **pm-9yfo** (under pm-o2kc) — history completeness gate: contract-enumerated CI proof that every mutating CLI/SDK action appends history; phase 1 (item scope) can start now. Horizon: near-mid.
- **pm-plwm** (under pm-9rxu) — index-backed --where query predicates so complex boolean/comparator selections stay O(result) at 100k-1M items instead of full-dump-through-jq; deps pm-801d/pm-dfg0, grammar placement per ADR pm-pbyu. Horizon: long.

Grammar brainstorm additions recorded in place: shared-verb-vocabulary principle + measurable token-budget acceptance target proposed on ADR pm-pbyu; partition census note on pm-n7rr.

Horizon map (unchanged ordering, new items placed): 1 near — pm-n7rr + pm-usfg (+ pm-9yfo phase 1); 2 mid — composability set, pm-qwoy findings burn-down, pm-klo8, pm-pee5, pm-e200; 3 long — pm-9rxu implementation (incl. pm-plwm), pm-g5sx merge semantics; 4+ — pm-agou GA contract, pm-is1a federation, pm-xc68 policy roles, pm-8ngt/pm-xtrd beyond-PM exemplars.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: 2026-07-07 full-backlog review (all statuses, 1663 items): grammar consolidation (pm-n7rr + ADR pm-pbyu) still maps the whole command surface; SDK-first promotion set, scale-out (pm-9rxu), composability (pm-m9xv), and beyond-PM exemplars (pm-8ngt/pm-xtrd) verified complete with no orphans. Three long-horizon gaps filed: pm-hib1 (read-only pm get --at time-travel projection), pm-4k6b (multi-signal context relevance engine under token budget), pm-3z0k (portable detached hash-chain attestation for third-party proof). No items closed; changelog untouched.

Full all-status review (session pm-su60): GH-issue coverage 26/26, all validate warnings mapped (pm-e9zh, pm-pivf), pm-n7rr grammar partition and pm-usfg promotion partition re-verified complete. Four dedupe-checked long-horizon gaps filed:

- pm-g5sx (under pm-o2kc) — tracker merge semantics: what "mergeable" (ADR pm-i7i4/pm-bl8x constraint) means per artifact class + post-merge reconciliation; prerequisite for pm-is1a federation. Horizon: long.

## Update 2026-07-07 — all-status backlog review + long-horizon planning pass
Full review across all 1657 items (open/closed/canceled) and the live command surface. Verified: GH-issue coverage 26/26; every pm validate warning maps to an open item (pm-e9zh close-reason evidence, pm-pivf GH-209 duplicate code); pm-n7rr grammar partition re-verified against the live 65-command surface (note on pm-n7rr); pm-usfg promotion partition unchanged and complete. Shipped-and-closed confirmation: restore-to-any-version (pm-9lc), history file recovery (pm-g6qd), per-stream hash-chain --verify, workspace-wide drift scan.

Three dedupe-checked gaps filed:
- **pm-klo8** (under pm-o2kc) — workspace-scoped audit history stream: schema/config/profile/init mutations currently leave NO append-only record (schema.ts/config.ts have zero history integration); closes the last hole in the every-mutation-leaves-immutable-proof invariant. Horizon: mid.
- **pm-9yfo** (under pm-o2kc) — history completeness gate: contract-enumerated CI proof that every mutating CLI/SDK action appends history; phase 1 (item scope) can start now. Horizon: near-mid.
- **pm-plwm** (under pm-9rxu) — index-backed --where query predicates so complex boolean/comparator selections stay O(result) at 100k-1M items instead of full-dump-through-jq; deps pm-801d/pm-dfg0, grammar placement per ADR pm-pbyu. Horizon: long.

Grammar brainstorm additions recorded in place: shared-verb-vocabulary principle + measurable token-budget acceptance target proposed on ADR pm-pbyu; partition census note on pm-n7rr.

Horizon map (unchanged ordering, new items placed): 1 near — pm-n7rr + pm-usfg (+ pm-9yfo phase 1); 2 mid — composability set, pm-qwoy findings burn-down, pm-klo8, pm-pee5, pm-e200; 3 long — pm-9rxu implementation (incl. pm-plwm), pm-g5sx merge semantics; 4+ — pm-agou GA contract, pm-is1a federation, pm-xc68 policy roles, pm-8ngt/pm-xtrd beyond-PM exemplars.

## Update 2026-07-07 — measurement-and-memory planning pass
Second same-day all-status review; grammar/promotion partitions and validate-warning mapping re-confirmed unchanged (pm-e9zh, pm-pivf still the only two warnings, both mapped). Theme of this pass: the backlog *builds* the context engine and token-efficient surface but did not *measure or preserve* them over time. Three dedupe-checked items filed:

- **pm-atfm** (under pm-9rxu) — context relevance evaluation harness: extends the shipped search-eval pattern (pm-u8n5) to pm context/next assembly; graded golden-workspace judgments, phase-1 baseline of the structural assembler BEFORE pm-4k6b lands, then per-signal attribution. Horizon: near-mid (phase 1 now).
- **pm-cu1i** (under pm-n7rr) — token-cost regression gate: pm-a22j's one-time baseline becomes a permanent CI budget ratchet over a representative invocation corpus (eslint-suppressions discipline). Horizon: near, lands with the consolidation it protects.
- **pm-5qmm** (under pm-9rxu) — workspace memory tiers: derived rollup summaries of closed-item epochs so decades-old work contributes bounded-token context; complements pm-o79o (disk cost) on the aging story; derived-only, never mutates tracked items. Horizon: long, after pm-801d/pm-4k6b; spike first.

Measurement triad now mirrors the initiative triad: pm-a22j+pm-cu1i measure token cost (pm-n7rr), pm-atfm measures context quality (pm-4k6b/pm-9rxu), pm-mi2x measures latency/memory (pm-9rxu).
